summary: Remediated the verifier-reported bounded-topology, ledger-projection, workflow-regression, and Temporal replay gaps without changing publication or issue state.

gapStatuses.requirement: Support an explicit complete bounded remediation topology and reject only partial or ambiguous active pairs
gapStatuses.evidence: Preset expansion now marks the verifier matching remediation_max_attempts as the active final gate; validation and workflow routing ignore authored pairs above the active budget while still requiring contiguous adjacent active pairs and rejecting incomplete or ambiguous active topology. Real issue-implement-work-pr expansion is covered at budgets 2 and 6.

gapStatuses.requirement: Budget ledgers must be actual, separate, complete, and consistent across checks, manifests, publish context, and incidents
gapStatuses.evidence: A single remediation-budget projection derives starts and completions from active remediation step-ledger rows. Accepted verifier checks and boundedStoryLoop continuation/terminal paths consume that projection instead of inferring consumption from the annotated current attempt.

gapStatuses.requirement: Required real-preset workflow and transition/exhaustion/no-progress/NO_DETERMINATION/incident regression matrix
gapStatuses.evidence: Tests expand the real issue-implement-work-pr preset, prove verify-1 routes once to remediation-2, prove all six remediation/verifier pairs form a unique ordered chain before final control stop, and prove FULLY_IMPLEMENTED exits. Existing transition and incident tests plus the extended three-cycle no-progress test cover recoverable NO_DETERMINATION, terminal/malformed outcomes, control-stop evidence, configured exhaustion, and changed-evidence reset.

Temporal test-server histories are generated for legacy pre-patch and current post-patch workflow definitions under one workflow type and replayed against the current definition. The post-patch command sequence delegates to the production resolver and asserts verify-1 occurs once followed by remediation-2.

targetedLocalChecks.details: 545 selected Python tests passed; the repository runner also completed 1081 frontend tests with 238 skipped. The two final real-preset assertions added after collection were rerun directly and passed.
19 passed, including actual pre/post-patch Temporal history replay and configured three-cycle no-progress exhaustion.
2 passed against final edits; covers real-preset bounded activation, six-pair routing/exhaustion, pass exit, and partial active-pair rejection.
2 passed with one unrelated google.generativeai deprecation warning.

targetedLocalChecks.command: python -m compileall -q api_service/services/presets/catalog.py moonmind/workflows/temporal/workflows/run.py tests/unit/api/test_presets_service.py tests/unit/workflows/temporal/test_run_replayer.py tests/unit/workflows/temporal/workflows/test_run_bounded_story_loop.py tests/unit/workflows/temporal/workflows/test_run_step_ledger.py && git diff --check

targetedLocalChecks.details: The authoritative verifier already established that this Docker installation lacks BuildKit support for Dockerfile RUN --mount; the focused local startup-seeding integration check passed instead.
